caption: A man with light-colored hair styled in a tall, peaked shape wears black headphones, clear-framed glasses, a white dress shirt, yellow suspenders, and a red-and-white patterned bowtie. He sits in a room featuring a framed green-and-yellow shield logo on the wall and a background banner that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS." He is positioned in front of a black microphone on a stand, facing toward the right side of the frame. Overlaid text on the screen includes a logo that says "TALK 101 PODCAST" on the left and "TALK 101" on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position and attire, with slight movements of his head and mouth as he appears to be speaking. The camera angle and lighting remain constant, focusing on the man from the waist up.
